metadata.title: Groww Stock, Mutual Fund, Gold
metadata.developer: Groww: Demat, Invest & Trade, Gold, Silver, Loans
metadata.description: Groww is India's No.1 Stock Broker 🏆, trusted by 4 Crore+ Indians. Open a free demat account and start investing & trading. 🚀Groww is your one app to invest & trade in: 👉Stocks 👉Mutual Funds 👉Futures and Options Trading (F&O) 👉Gold and Silver 👉Margin Trading Facility (MTF) 👉Commodity Derivatives: Gold, Silver, Crude Oil, Natural Gas and more 👉Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) 👉IPO 👉Bonds 👉API Trading Reasons why Indians love investing on Groww 👉 Free demat account (Individual, HUF, Corporate) 👉 0 AMC & no hidden charges 👉 24*7 customer support ⭐Stocks, ETFs, IPO, MTF & Intraday Trading • Open a free demat & trading account in minutes • Buy & Sell stocks listed on NSE & BSE stock exchanges • Boost trades with up to 5X leverage on Intraday Trading • Auto-invest in Stocks & ETF with SIP • Buy up to 4X more stocks with MTF (Margin Trading Facility) • Explore fundamentals & financials of popular stocks like Angel One, 5Paisa Capital, Meesho, ICICI Pru, Vodafone Idea etc. • Apply for upcoming stock market IPOs • Trade using TradingView’s advanced charts • Set alerts to track stock price movements for trading & investing decisions • Trade smarter with Intraday Screener • Set Target & Stoploss both with OCO order for Intraday Trading • Get insights on your investing or trading portfolio’s performance, allocation, risk, dividends & XIRR with Portfolio Analysis ⭐Mutual Funds Investing • Invest in direct mutual funds with 0% commission • Estimate portfolio returns with SIP calculator • Track all your Mutual Funds investments in ONE place - Import & Redeem external funds easily • Save tax up to Rs.46,800 with Tax Saving Mutual Funds (ELSS funds) • Invest money via SIP or lumpsum in Mutual Funds offered by AMCs like Zerodha, SBI, Quant, Parag Parikh, Bandhan, HDFC, Motilal Oswal, Axis, ICICI Mutual Fund etc. • Switch from one fund to another within the same fund house, without having to redeem it ⭐Futures & Options Trading (F&O) • Track Indian & Global Indices like NIFTY, SENSEX, NASDAQ, GIFT NIFTY, NIFTY MIDCAP, NIFTY NEXT 50 etc to make informed trading calls • Trade better in Futures & Options with Safe Exit, Advanced Option Chain, Instant Pledge etc • Use advanced charts to invest smarter & make informed futures & options trading calls • Super-fast Options Trading with multiple indicators & live portfolio overview. • Place Basket Orders with convenience during option trading • Trade above freeze quantity in Options • Test your strategy with Payoff Graph & trade with confidence in futures & options • Exit your F&O positions instantly in a click with Fast Exit ⭐Commodity Derivatives Trading • Trade in Gold, Silver, Crude Oil, Natural Gas, Zinc, Aluminium & Copper • Trades executed in under 0.05 seconds for a smooth experience • Pledge your stock holdings to boost your margin and take larger positions Personal Loans • Tenure: 3 to 60 months • APR: 13-48% Registered NBFC (lenders) • Groww CreditServ Technology Private Limited • IDFC First Bank Ltd • Kisetsu Saison Finance (India) Pvt Ltd Groww is acting as the DLA for the above lenders. Example: Tenure-12 months Rate of Interest-15% per annum Processing fee-₹1000 (2% inclusive GST) Total Interest-₹4156 EMI-₹4513 APR-18.89% Amount Disbursed-₹49000 Total repayment amount-₹54156 Groww Invest Tech Pvt Ltd SEBI Registration no: INZ000301838 Member Code: BSE-6699 NSE-90187, MCX- 57420 Segment/s: Cash & FNO (Equity & Commodity Derivatives) Privacy policy: https://groww.in/privacy-policy Groww’s registered office: Vaishnavi Tech Park, South Tower, 3rd floor, Sarjapur Main Road, Bengaluru, Karnataka-560103 Groww is India's No.1 Stock Broker in terms of active customers as per NSE data dated October 31, 2025.
metadata.description_html:
Groww is India's No.1 Stock Broker 🏆, trusted by 4 Crore+ Indians. Open a free demat account and start investing & trading.

🚀Groww is your one app to invest & trade in:
👉Stocks
👉Mutual Funds
👉Futures and Options Trading (F&O)
👉Gold and Silver
👉Margin Trading Facility (MTF)
👉Commodity Derivatives: Gold, Silver, Crude Oil, Natural Gas and more
👉Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs)
👉IPO
👉Bonds
👉API Trading

Reasons why Indians love investing on Groww
👉 Free demat account (Individual, HUF, Corporate)
👉 0 AMC & no hidden charges
👉 24*7 customer support

⭐Stocks, ETFs, IPO, MTF & Intraday Trading
• Open a free demat & trading account in minutes
• Buy & Sell stocks listed on NSE & BSE stock exchanges
• Boost trades with up to 5X leverage on Intraday Trading
• Auto-invest in Stocks & ETF with SIP
• Buy up to 4X more stocks with MTF (Margin Trading Facility)
• Explore fundamentals & financials of popular stocks like Angel One, 5Paisa Capital, Meesho, ICICI Pru, Vodafone Idea etc.
• Apply for upcoming stock market IPOs
• Trade using TradingView’s advanced charts
• Set alerts to track stock price movements for trading & investing decisions
• Trade smarter with Intraday Screener
• Set Target & Stoploss both with OCO order for Intraday Trading
• Get insights on your investing or trading portfolio’s performance, allocation, risk, dividends & XIRR with Portfolio Analysis

⭐Mutual Funds Investing
• Invest in direct mutual funds with 0% commission
• Estimate portfolio returns with SIP calculator
• Track all your Mutual Funds investments in ONE place - Import & Redeem external funds easily
• Save tax up to Rs.46,800 with Tax Saving Mutual Funds (ELSS funds)
• Invest money via SIP or lumpsum in Mutual Funds offered by AMCs like Zerodha, SBI, Quant, Parag Parikh, Bandhan, HDFC, Motilal Oswal, Axis, ICICI Mutual Fund etc.
• Switch from one fund to another within the same fund house, without having to redeem it

⭐Futures & Options Trading (F&O)
• Track Indian & Global Indices like NIFTY, SENSEX, NASDAQ, GIFT NIFTY, NIFTY MIDCAP, NIFTY NEXT 50 etc to make informed trading calls
• Trade better in Futures & Options with Safe Exit, Advanced Option Chain, Instant Pledge etc
• Use advanced charts to invest smarter & make informed futures & options trading calls
• Super-fast Options Trading with multiple indicators & live portfolio overview.
• Place Basket Orders with convenience during option trading
• Trade above freeze quantity in Options
• Test your strategy with Payoff Graph & trade with confidence in futures & options
• Exit your F&O positions instantly in a click with Fast Exit

⭐Commodity Derivatives Trading
• Trade in Gold, Silver, Crude Oil, Natural Gas, Zinc, Aluminium & Copper
• Trades executed in under 0.05 seconds for a smooth experience
• Pledge your stock holdings to boost your margin and take larger positions

Personal Loans
• Tenure: 3 to 60 months
• APR: 13-48%

Registered NBFC (lenders)
• Groww CreditServ Technology Private Limited
• IDFC First Bank Ltd
• Kisetsu Saison Finance (India) Pvt Ltd

Groww is acting as the DLA for the above lenders.

Example:
Tenure-12 months
Rate of Interest-15% per annum
Processing fee-₹1000 (2% inclusive GST)
Total Interest-₹4156
EMI-₹4513
APR-18.89%
Amount Disbursed-₹49000
Total repayment amount-₹54156

Groww Invest Tech Pvt Ltd
SEBI Registration no: INZ000301838
Member Code: BSE-6699 NSE-90187, MCX- 57420
Segment/s: Cash & FNO (Equity & Commodity Derivatives)

Privacy policy: https://groww.in/privacy-policy
Groww’s registered office: Vaishnavi Tech Park, South Tower, 3rd floor, Sarjapur Main Road, Bengaluru, Karnataka-560103

Groww is India's No.1 Stock Broker in terms of active customers as per NSE data dated October 31, 2025.
metadata.summary: Groww is India's No.1 Stock Broker 🏆, trusted by 4 Crore+ Indians. Open a free demat account and start investing & trading. 🚀Groww is your one app to invest &

reviews.author: Gaurav Domadia
reviews.content: There is a lot of lag and the refresh is not as fast as other apps. In the dashboard, the app needs to show the up and down figurewise also, not just percentage wise. Like how many rupees has the price of the stock moved up or down. Also, the money withdrawal takes a very long time. Why? In the two other apps that i use, money withdrawal is a lot quicker. There is no long waiting period.

reviews.author: Manika Chhabra
reviews.content: The app works too slowly, sometimes the search results just don't load. The help and support section has an option of ' raise a ticket' ,which doesn't lead to anywhere. That button is unresponsive. If you call the customer care number, there is never ending message of ' dear customer, all our service executives are currently busy assisting other customers.' I waited for about 30 minutes on the call, only to find np one answering my call. It is impossible to reach out to support team.

reviews.author: Atharva Boralkar
reviews.content: Honest review : worst payment method provided by any stock broker. As a customer you have to wait for 4 days just to get approved to withdraw money from your account. And just to be clear that payment method fails for 8/10 times. One other thing, once you sell your stocks, then your amount don't get credited in your wallet. 20% amount is credited 2 days later. This shows how strong the payment structure is.

reviews.author: anjali khurana
reviews.content: At the peak hours of trading the app just stop working, either orders are not completed or I'm not able to see my stocks (More than 500 that I have bought) on the dashboard. This has happened before as well and I ignored as one time glitch but do you guys don't understand the gravity of this platform and people can suffer major losses due to these repeated issues and eventually would change the platform if not fixed ASAP.

reviews.author: Ali Abbas
reviews.content: I wanted to sell my F&O at some profit, but the system started showing errors. Don't buy anything here they are stealing your money. (The is not resolved, I placed an order of sale at 48, which I was updating at market price. when the price goes to 92, your app made a sale of 48. I this the way you resolve it. Do you know the difference of 92 and 48.

reviews.author: Bhajan Shil
reviews.content: I must say that the platform is not bad. but there is a problem. "Account closing" process is very bad. For closing an account you have to courier the form to their office. My question is if the KYC can be done digitally, why Account closure is not possible digitally ? The app should give "Account Closing" option directly on the app. It seems a normal problem on first look, but you will feel the problem when you actually want to close your account. This is the reason I can't recommend this app.

reviews.author: Blasphamer The_Great
reviews.content: They charge too much! Almost zero profit. Not recommended! One more thing: You can't withdraw your money after crediting your groww account, unless you've have used that money to trade first, (suffer gain or loss) Only then you are allowed to withdraw. Simply put, your money is stuck the moment you transfer it there.

reviews.author: Ching blog
reviews.content: Warning: Think twice before using Groww for Active Trading! 🛑 ​​"Don't use Groww for active trading or options. It's okay for long-term investment or just monitoring stocks, but for execution, it is very unreliable. The app lags almost 100% of the time during live trades, and the data is often inaccurate. Using it for trading is a sure way to lose your money due to technical errors. Stay safe and choose a better platform for trading."I have personally suffered a loss of over ₹10+ Lakhs..

reviews.author: Pardeep Singh Channa
reviews.content: Bas app, be careful. Non supportive customer care. Maximum time number not connecting. Call cut down in between conversation if somehow connects. App frequently crashes. Today it crashed when I tried to exit from F&O and it doesn't load data. Throwback errors. Due to which I got into negative money and market closed and my money put on hold. Now, tomorrow is expiry and all premium will be cut out. I lost money. I am definitely uninstalling this app after collecting whatever left with me.

reviews.author: Narendra Singh
reviews.content: “You can add money anytime, but for withdrawals, you only allow it on Monday at 10 AM — what kind of rule is that? You take money whenever you want, but when it comes to withdrawals, users are forced to wait. This app is absolutely useless. My honest advice is to uninstall it. The service is completely terrible.”

reviews.author: Nagraj Konda
reviews.content: I receive notifications from Groww, but there is no option in the app to view all notifications in one place. Once the notification panel is cleared, all notifications are gone and cannot be accessed again. I request that you provide a feature in the app to view daily notifications or notification history

reviews.author: krishna chaitanya
reviews.content: yesterday I lost 4k because of App. Reason: when I am trying to navigate app got stuck for few seconds i tried clicking 2 or 3 times and after few seconds it got responded and result is my shares got soldout at 1 rupees lesser than market price... 1st of all as when sell window opens app chooses always lesser than market value don't why.... 2nd why you are selling below the market price even if user is selecting a price below market don't know why...

reviews.author: Laxmi Varma
reviews.content: This is a third-class app. Never trade on it because they charge extra money in the name of brokerage and other taxes. You will lose almost all your profit. I traded and made ₹15,000, but only ₹2,700 got credited—isn’t that insane? And this is not the first time this has happened. Earlier, when the profit was higher, I ignored it, but this time it was too much. It’s better to trade with other apps like Dhan. This is a complete waste of time and money.

reviews.author: Bhavy Jain
reviews.content: Not reliable for regular traders. It lags in the peak time and you can loss you huge money in the minutes. In my personal experience I was trying to close the trade or trying to convert it into delivery on 3:10 PM but due to error in the app I was not able to either close or extend it and has exit on its own not recommend at all.

reviews.author: shanmukh rao
reviews.content: Yesterday, I installed the Groww app and began intraday trading. After buying stocks, I tried to exit my positions but faced an issue with the app. I called customer support and waited about 10 minutes. After a 43 Minute call, she was told that I needed to use a laptop to exit. I realised I would have been in a tough spot if I hadn’t had a laptop available. I also worry about what might have happened if I had invested a larger amount and faced a bigger loss while using the app.

reviews.author: Adithya
reviews.content: If we pledge our shares once and later unpledge them, we are being charged twice — once for pledging and once for unpledging. That itself is understandable, but the problem is that I have been charged multiple times even though I performed this action only once. After pledging and unpledging my shares one time, I did not perform any further pledge or unpledge transactions. However, I am still being charged repeatedly.

reviews.author: Abey Thomas
reviews.content: Earlier, this app worked fine, but over the last month, it has become very unreliable. Withdrawing money is not as easy as it used to be — most of the time, my withdrawal requests get auto-declined without any clear reason. There’s no response from customer care, and the issue remains unresolved. Very disappointing experience lately. Not recommended until they fix these problems.

reviews.author: Manish Maherchandani
reviews.content: I am trying since many days to import all internal and external Mutual Funds but app is just showing that they will come with new update shortly, but i don't know when new updates will come. Till the time we just have to wait. It is a very disappointing thing in today's digital era customer have to wait so long just to get own funds details. Team request to resolve at earliest

reviews.author: Raju Gupta
reviews.content: This has been the worst experience — I strongly advise against installing this app. Choose another broker instead, because the support is inadequate and stop-loss orders get executed arbitrarily, even when the price action hasn’t reached the set level. I’ve already moved to another broker.

reviews.author: Nikhil Mungekar
reviews.content: Frustrated with the NAV allocation on this app. I consistently get a higher price than what is officially listed for the day I invested. Seems like there's a delay in processing orders that costs the user money. Be careful if you're trying to buy the dips. I will never buy mutual funds from Groww again and will be looking for a more reliable platform for my investments.

reviews.author: Ashish Sahu
reviews.content: In the holdings section, total shares, invested amount, total P&L in percentage, and day’s P&L in percentage should be shown, just like in Zerodha Kite. This essential information should be visible on a single screen, not after tapping or using filters. This is necessary to take appropriate action to exit from positions. Without this data, trading in Groww is not convenient.

reviews.author: Arun Walia
reviews.content: I had a very pathetic experience with Groww. Their stop-loss and target features did not work properly. I would strongly advise others not to trade with Groww based on my experience. If you are in profit and have set a 30-point target, even after the market touches that price (or comes very close, around 10 points away), the system exits the trade early. However, when you are in a loss, the stop-loss works correctly

reviews.author: Deepak Khare
reviews.content: I have been using the grow app for the last 3 years now I conclude this is very worst app. I have placed an order and it was successfully placed. after 2 hrs my account balance showed negative balance. and my trade was showing 1100 profit when trade went negative it is auto square off. when connect to support he said we due to holiday your profite amount and your real money was blocked due to this account balance is showing negative. and it will reflect today after EOD run. seriously.

reviews.author: Onkar Sangewar
reviews.content: it's the worst, I was investing for like 13 months in two SIP's and cancelled one of them today but after doing this my dashboard is showing less than 50% of my invested amount. Before cancelling one of my SIP my dashboard showed 5000 something and now it's spinning only 1000 something. I wanted to raise this query on their helpline but their chatgpt isn't working and also whenever I try to call on their helpline number it always does it's busy. So if you love your money, keep it away from groww

reviews.author: Ankit Karwa
reviews.content: One of the worst broker. I palced an order today but my app got a glitch where i was not able to see my open order. I had to keep a safe exit because today was expiry and i got panicked because it was a 3 pm trade. I had to book my loss of 40 points because of this glitch and did not want to lose all my capital. I have screenshots of the trade but the company is not accepting their fault. A similar issue happened with my cousin last week. Deleted this app because of their platform issues.

reviews.author: Yasar Satvilkar
reviews.content: On the listing day, the stock was not visible on the Groww app for around 10 minutes after it went live on the exchange. During the same time, it was available for trading on other brokerage platforms. This delay prevented me from entering at my intended price. For active traders, even a few minutes matter. I hope necessary improvements are made to avoid such delays in future listings.

reviews.author: atul dhote
reviews.content: very worst app . After settlement final price is changed. In my experience I book loss in future options position appz Rs 1450 in morning before 11 am. at night after settlement they deduct Rs 3829 . entry show 3829 loss for future options in transaction history. There customer support show as 24/7 but I try to connect then no one give response on call. There is no option to give Star ⭐ below 1 otherwise i will give him negative rating.

reviews.author: imvy
reviews.content: order not executed as per stop loss. customer support very poor. they will just use the script to respond without trying to solve the issue. they will say they understand the problem but in fact they have no clue how much they have hurt their customer.

reviews.author: Raviraju Alle
reviews.content: It's a very difficult app for an option trader while the limit orders execute in the market & GTT orders will execute far from the limit we set. SL is also the same, if we keep 10 points as SL it goes nearly 13 to 14 points & hits the SL. while coming to targets if we keep 20 points it will hit nearly 16 to 18 points. And the app does not provide any bracket orders, we can't set our targets & SL before the order activates, we only set the SL & Targets once the order activates.

reviews.author: Bidisa Sarkar
reviews.content: I added ₹1200 to my wallet. The stock price was ₹1171, but ₹1180 got deducted, there are too many hidden charges. The charges should be shown in the app, right? Why doesn’t it show this? This is not good. I thought I'm making money but instead I lost money with the hidden charges...agar negetive stars hote to wohi deti

reviews.author: Dr. Abhishek Goyal Optometrist
reviews.content: 1. After new update no expiry is written - when it is there - earlier it was written that today its expiry day . 2. index and sensex is now so small its look very bad . 3. when some news comes for particular stocks then that stocks must get one symbol like bell so that one know and open the news about that stock ... now i again again have to look for news section of every stock for any update. so kinldy do the change as soon as possible. ??? nothing is done for the same .

reviews.author: John Leibert
reviews.content: very slow process and disappointing process, I buyed a share for 281rs and I sell it for 295rs, the blockage charges for that share was 5rs, so I have the profit for 285, but there process was so slow it took more than a week. and because of there delay the market got crashed and the value of that share was low so I received the payment of 250. so it's not ok for big investors and traders, because if you know that the market is gonna crash tomorrow you can't make it in time to sell it.

reviews.author: jaysukh katariya
reviews.content: After completing a trade, the balance does not update immediately. Sometimes it shows a huge negative balance in many lakhs, due to which I am unable to place another trade instantly. Because of this delay and incorrect balance display, I have faced losses. The app should improve real-time balance updates and margin calculations, especially for option trading.

reviews.author: Prasad
reviews.content: After the latest update I experienced a glitch, during intraday - I entered the price in order so it will trigger automatically as usual but it placed the current price the same thing happened during the sell order. it happened with me 2 buy order, 2 sell order total 4 time. app doesn't register What price number I placed in the price box

reviews.author: Ram
reviews.content: recently u r app quality has deteriorated vastly, app crashing, groww balance disappearing and loading after 30min , MF sip auto pay not working, stock classified incorrectly, tax implications not mentioned for many mutual funds.. most annoying is ur support team closing tickets without remedy and with answering to the query just pushing the ball to our court saying I called u , but u didn't respond. either I respond or not, issue is clearly mentioned, they just reply it is resolved or wip

reviews.author: DEVENDRA KUMAR
reviews.content: Current update is not really good because the card of indexes like nifty 50 which were at the top, now they have been collapse which is not good for me. Every time if I wanted to see the nifty 50 like index I have to open it but before it was showing there just like other stocks.

reviews.author: Gautam Yadav
reviews.content: Earlier it was good because it has some smart features that I liked that were live candle moves showing ups and downs and other other ones was growth of the stock from which date you have added in your watchlist. but not all the features have been removed.

reviews.author: Anil Khera
reviews.content: very poor customer service - unable to address customer queries. just cut paste response. security is a big concern. your portfolio gets accessed by their other company without any check response to issues raised take a lot of time and follow ups

reviews.author: Arindam Mondal
reviews.content: Worst customer service. My groww app logged out automatically. Most vulnerable app. Groww must add either 2 factor authentication or sim verification like bank apps for login.I contacted the customer service but no reply. Useless app. I think I have to shift from groww to other app.

reviews.author: Keerti Usha
reviews.content: i don't know what happened but the app is showing ``your journey is in reset process '' . This is my first time of using a trade app and showing this from the start.... I haven't even started my journey.... Not to raise complain but to reach your concern..... kindly rectify the issue

reviews.author: Chinu Bhatt
reviews.content: it's brokerage charge is high even they advertised 0 % delivery charge but actually thay taken charge when you buy delivery stock and sell , even they say there charge call is 5 to 20 by grow charge but when you sell your delivery stocks they charge more then it, and other charge not included that tax and gov. charge is also add it's and your pfrofit is many time none if you investment little money

reviews.author: Aditya Joshi
reviews.content: Dark pattern - showed me "activate F&O " interstitial with the options pre selected, just after opening the app. Usually in its place, there is some informative banner that you're just accustomed to dismissing at a click. Did not expect this from Groww.

reviews.author: Soumya Sarkar
reviews.content: The tradingview chart from groww app is not working. And also it is not properly showing the 52 weeks high and low.. Too much bugs and glitches. Probably have to shift to another broker

reviews.author: उत्तर प्रदेश अध्यक्ष मा. बृजेन्द्र सिंह
reviews.content: I am very disappointed with Groww. The platform charges high fees on almost every transaction, whether the investment amount is small or large. There also appear to be extra or hidden charges, making it costly for investors. These high costs reduce overall returns and make the experience frustrating. Groww should improve transparency and lower its charges to support small investors. Currently, it does not feel user-friendly or affordable.

reviews.author: Jemison Pohlong
reviews.content: this broker is hiding some data .It is not transparent .The transaction is not showing all something hiding the credit. And after release the trade the profit also did not show that much profit and which time will adding didn't show. Now I experience myself this broker is hiding transaction data so that we didn't know whether the profit credit or not credit after release the trade.

reviews.author: Niket Kumar Sharma
reviews.content: Please add features like on chart buy and sell features just like international app on chart put stoploss through line just drop on chart and stoploss is done

reviews.author: Praveen Raju
reviews.content: A lot of issues after updating are struck frequently, sometimes flash ups happen and trigger the target and end up with losses and sometimes don't execute the set targets after receding the target price by the time we see it will be in loss... this is leading to lots of loss to the users

reviews.author: Abhijeet Chavan
reviews.content: Price not Update Real Time Somewhere Stuck.. Especially in MCX Trading...it's all about money not about points..and that look like developers are not serious about customers money...

reviews.author: rakhshanda mujib
reviews.content: The app was working just fine when they disabled the feature that would let you export the external funds as well. By when can we expect the feature enablement? The dashboard has old data for the portfolio that really doesn't help to track my investments.

reviews.author: Viren Singh
reviews.content: I have been trying to update my external mutual fund holdings for the last one week, but every time it shows that the “Updation of external holdings is paused.” Could you please confirm how long this will continue and when the service is expected to resume?

reviews.author: Akshay Kaushik
reviews.content: Team, I am not able to fetch the latest details on my mutual funds on groww, I really find it easier to Access the UI and not wanting to switch to a different app for my mutual fund transactions. It says external funds tracking is paused by mfcentral, but on other apps it's working, Please let me know if this can be fixed, expecting a response before I plan to switch to another application.

reviews.author: Bhole Nath Tiwari
reviews.content: App is nice and user friendly but at some critical time to stop the loss or withdraw the profit it stops showing exit button due to this inconvenience it is feeling more than worst. why we will need the exit button after loosing all the money? Dear grow team I have faced this difficulty several time during intraday trading which is the worst ever experience. Please look into the matter and resolve the issue at the earliest to loose many users.

reviews.author: Yash Patel
reviews.content: auto save is not working drawings are not getting saved very disgusting. and sync is not working properly between web and mobile Today itself open account and same day closing or otherwise fix it

reviews.author: Kiranjot Singh Dhalla
reviews.content: Dear Groww... Please Remove the Stup¡d Effects in latest Update.... "The Rising Building effect" is so Non-Sense... it irritates everytime when we go to Check any Stocks Financials.... also wastes 1 - 2 seconds everytime....this is so irritating effect.... Keep the App Simple and Smart.....Not Stup¡d and please remove this non sense thing Asap 🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻

reviews.author: Deep Raval
reviews.content: order get canceled with out reason in intraday if delivery was taken at 11 am in morning no reason anything and also autopay will be added of any amount without consent some time seems like scan. please watch out for autopay if not active might be 15k auto can be added automatically.

reviews.author: Devansh Sharma
reviews.content: Doesn't work properly when a stock's demergers happens, reports unnecessary loss, while the price reduced due to split of the stock.

reviews.author: suryakant1001
reviews.content: sl trail jumping not awailable its big poor condition then other app. please give this function hidden charge is very high with gst.realy grow charge 150 rupies per order and sl and tg process when we change sl then sl will not hit same point. and comodity not awailable

reviews.author: Kuldeep Chahal
reviews.content: I tried using your app, and while its interface is excellent, there is a need to add a few features—for instance, it currently does not display the 'Change in Open Interest' option for futures.

reviews.author: Devendra Sahu
reviews.content: Many bugs are coming while trading in apps and they are irritating me. please don't encourage me to use other apps. Today apps facing same problem. Why . Today now

reviews.author: sukesh rachapalli
reviews.content: Do you guys even realize the top portion of app showing futures and options indices are truncated to half from one week...still I don't see any fix

reviews.author: Zafar Alam
reviews.content: Best interface amongst all. easy to use, but customer support is very bad.

reviews.author: Kp P
reviews.content: it's hang too much when we place call put order in intrade। I very disappointed 😞 order can't show on order list immediately it's take refresh too much time ।pls team improve it

reviews.author: Tuhin dey
reviews.content: Well, everything was fine but from last month 21st external fund can't be updated! Don't know why this error reflecting!

reviews.author: Sidharth Chouhan
reviews.content: external fund is not updating please solve issues, Massage showing,"Your existing tracked funds will stay visible.We'll be back soon with an updated experience."

reviews.author: Anirban Chakrabortty
reviews.content: I invest in a new mutual fund scheme.but older folow is visisble.new one is not showing in grow app. i uninstall many times but not updated any more. help me in this particular problem.

reviews.author: nitika aggarwal
reviews.content: The UX is degrading day by day. It used to have a good UX but now its gone would be switching to a different app soon.

reviews.author: K. N. Singh
reviews.content: Scripts are so small, unable to read it . I tried but couldn't create my account. The whole process is not user friendly.

reviews.author: Partha Dhar
reviews.content: An average app for learner bcoz the chart lags, don't hit SL , not good for scalping.

reviews.author: Swapnil Sonawane
reviews.content: Unable to switch fund though 3 year locking period got over. Showing error while switching

reviews.author: brahmeswari nemalikonda
reviews.content: from past 1week am observing hung, due to this delay/hung am not able to buy/sell accurately. this causing me loss. please fix this issue

reviews.author: Saurabh Kumar
reviews.content: app is lagging most of time. not able to place the trade properly.

reviews.author: Aman
reviews.content: i applied a SIP through UPI but it never gets debited automatically. Every month i have to manually pay it.

reviews.author: Veshnavi Ukg
reviews.content: Not as expected. 1. Unable to find all report at one place. 2. Not able to show MF linked with Groww only once you had extracted your external funds. so you can't check performance of your MF purchased through groww. 3. MF can't be adjusted as per your own will. Supposed if you want to change your SIP from monthly to weekly it is not possible in grow. 4.

reviews.author: Nayankumar Korat
reviews.content: App requires too many clicks to get the results for example if you want to open a specific watchlist first you need to scroll horizontally to see the 'All watchlist', then select your watchlist. Equity and F&O position and orders are placed at different places. The most annoying part is that it does not have AMO order features for F&O.

reviews.author: SOUMENDU GHOSHAL
reviews.content: more tool like year wise returns, rolling returns,filter using AUM size and a lot more features is missing in mutual fund section.

reviews.author: Mr. Mukesh Kumar
reviews.content: Under reports and Statement section when we view our Stocks P&L the stock are being shown multiple times like duplicates. When we apply filter, still it's malformed data not exactly filtered in a sequence like how to low or low to high. While buying shares when we try to enter amount most of the time it's freezez at 0.02 with red marks by default and I manually have to back press and clear all amount and then enter the correct amount instead it should allow to enter the amount we want not 0.02

reviews.author: Mahendra Panchal
reviews.content: Dont trust this broker...the chart and option chain gets hang and we can not exit even in profit.

reviews.author: Prajwal RN
reviews.content: recent update is not good. on click of any stock it will ask for view chart set alert or need to open stock details. I am clicking on stock name to see the details right it's obvious. This is not user friendly. Instead changes can be made like on click of stock name you can make the stock details to open and on click of chart place you can make chart to open. similar to on click of market price how it will change to to 52w high low

reviews.author: S K
reviews.content: New update is not fine as we click it on Option chain it directly confirms the order execution.

reviews.author: Dhrumil Bhankhar
reviews.content: Once you apply for IPO, you can't cancel your request. They will take the whole day to cancel and if it's last day you can't apply again just because they won't cancel. Contacted support and that's how they say it works

reviews.author: Khanjan Das
reviews.content: First thing, i would like to say is that it has many technical issues. I have been using this app for the last 3 months and was not facing much technical issues. However after the recent update, it's not the same anymore. My portfolios sometimes gets dissappear, and then shows again after a while leading to tense situations and difficulties in trading. Please do fix this error.

reviews.author: R. P Kharmutee
reviews.content: The taxes and brokerage is costlier compared to Dhan and Zerodha but the smooth experience makes me forget that and it makes me wanting to stick with this app for trading but thee only thing which I fit is missing is 1) the trailing SL and target directly from charts(like the ones in Dhan app) which makes quite easier to trail both SL and target levels. 2) changing between stocks which are added your personal created wishlist from charts itself.

reviews.author: Praveen Ramancha
reviews.content: Nice app, but for Stop Loss (SL) or Take Profit (TP) we have to go back and manually enter the price. For scalping, futures, and options trading, it would be better if there is a direct option where we can simply drag and place the SL or TP on the chart wherever we want. That would be the best feature. Otherwise, the market may reverse quickly within seconds and many people may lose their money. I think this improvement would help your app grow. Please consider improving this point. ☝️

reviews.author: vishal Kumar
reviews.content: please improve their features of marking the support and resistance level of big time frame but I come in small time frame what earlier 9 marked it is show very far in shorter time frame . my one suggestion is add a feature in scalping mode I can see the chart in different time frame . i can see the difference index 5 min chart and see the f&0 chart in different time frame

reviews.author: SIVA SNEHAL A
reviews.content: Unable to track external Stock Portfolios of Zerodha, Mstock, ICICI Direct in the App. On trying to track it always showing as in Progress for the last several week's. I have uninstalled the app and cleared the cache. I suppose there is some Glitch kindly do the needful at the earliest.

reviews.author: Santhoz San
reviews.content: I cannot see the holdings tab values for the last couple of days and the issue is still not resolved yet . Am I the one facing this issue or everyone ? UI wise app looks good and easy to track. kindly address the above issue

reviews.author: Mehul Saxena
reviews.content: Great app! please add complete charts for 1hr, 1D time frame, currently it shows only 3 months data. which limits analysis to a certain time frame only

reviews.author: Ashish Yadav
reviews.content: Interface is good, Speed of placing order is good. But CHARGES are worst part , it charges the most in industry.

reviews.author: Sanjay B.
reviews.content: the app doesnt load and currently just not able to use the app at all. not able to connect to support either via chat or phone, or email.

reviews.author: SUMAN BAKCHI
reviews.content: Use of app, is not much user friendly. lagging behind its Peer, considering filter, sorting features.

reviews.author: Baba Ji
reviews.content: grow is good but no the best because when you add the wallet money hidden charges is a bad facility. for the time being is good. l am invested on grow

reviews.author: Deepika Pandit
reviews.content: Hi Myself Deepika Pandit I am facing issue while creating account. There is this last step that says proceed to eSign no matter how many times I clicked on it tge only response that I hot was try again later . I am stucked in that page for past 2 days . I also deleted the app and re-download it but no progress. I don't know what to do now . I hope that you go through this issue of mine and help me to resolve it . Thank you

reviews.author: Pritam Shee
reviews.content: The platform works well, but there is one issue that needs improvement. When placing an order, the TP (Take Profit) and SL (Stop Loss) are not set automatically, and it becomes difficult to add them manually from the position panel. It would be very helpful if you could introduce a drag-and-drop feature for TP and SL directly on the chart. This feature would make trading much faster and easier, not only for me but for many other users as well. Please consider adding this in a future update.

reviews.author: SAGAR MAZUMDAR
reviews.content: dear groww, what's the benefit of setting safe exit when you don't do it accordingly. when it's come to set safe loss, it's trigger after the set amount, and when it's come to set profit, the amount triggered at very low for exp I've set safe exit at 1200 to book my profit but it's triggered at 1100. what's the use of it tell me

reviews.author: chirag parekh
reviews.content: the new app design is really a downgrade from previous one. when I open app I don't just want to see numbers about current market trend I want to see it by percentage as well. I want to see by how many percentage the market is up or down. please bring that back please...

reviews.author: Jayanth S
reviews.content: Great interface, clean UI, provides more useful information. Drawbacks being 1. No weekly SIPs for Mutual funds. 2. No switch between funds in your portfolio with different fund houses. Please try to include these, would really help a lot.

reviews.author: Lakkireddy Tarun reddy
reviews.content: I invested some amount in liquid fund. After somedays I sold my mutual fund units even amount also credited in my account. After sold my units till it is showing that fund even after one week. I hope this small glitches will resolve in soon. Remaining overall app experience is good

reviews.author: Deepak Velandy
reviews.content: when we get notification about stocks and indexes, when we click that to open app asks for biometric authentication for open, this happens everytime even while logged in the application or monitoring the market. fix this issue.

reviews.author: Shyam Gajaria
reviews.content: Otherwise it's good but lot of improvement needed. 1. Multiple accounts log in or switch accounts 2. Simple Insights to cumulate all data and give decision making power to users.

reviews.author: Tanishka K
reviews.content: hey im facing issue in past i make id on grow and from my email but later i deleted my that email now I registered again with my pan but it's not login it required new pan kindly look forward in this im facing this issue can't use this app phone no. is same but not have access to that email id cause delete that.

reviews.author: Upama Barman
reviews.content: I had complained regarding delink of mail id with a name however same is not completed .. we have tried to reach out your customer service no such proper assistant provided. Now life time I am unable to use grow, is this is groww is all about. Mail send, currently I am able to login.

reviews.author: Rolex king
reviews.content: this is useful for student to grow and but we have some technic to buy a stock at a right time. for me I think it's useful to start this trade stock market ❤️

reviews.author: Rituparna Kakati
reviews.content: How vedanta is showing is 52 week high at 322 price. I can see on 29th April, it was 770. This is how this application works. 🤦

reviews.author: Shivanshu Parbat
reviews.content: @groww, this app is not working in landscape mode, please try to fix it. overall good.

reviews.author: Nitin Salgar
reviews.content: Nee update version have so many glich....no one chart clearly visualized....I open one chart and it shows another

reviews.author: Ami Akash
reviews.content: Moderate to good app. good for long term holding. bad for intraday trading / margin trading. they are still the slower than the big competitors (like big banks). I would have given 5 stars if there was an option to increase the font size in the app. it should be customisable. the fonts are for ants, not for human eyes.

reviews.author: Veeresh Hiremath
reviews.content: very Good App, Very useful & user friendly. easy to use. But recently it is not working properly. some times it is not showing stocks candle chart..

reviews.author: Sushant Patil
reviews.content: Nice and easy to use this app, good user interface but customer support is not good and it is very hard to reach customer support

reviews.author: PRAGYANRANJAN PANIGRAHI
reviews.content: everything works fine but don't know why tracking and updating of external funds is paused.

reviews.author: NABAJEET
reviews.content: brokerage charges are very high, sometimes orders are placed lately. And this app runs outdated features, no trailing stop loss option.Im planning to shift another apps.

reviews.author: kk luna
reviews.content: I love groww, deserves a 5 star but why only 3 star? because they never allow SL Trailing by dragging the SL line. Such a huge and efficient platform should allow and update something as simple as this.

reviews.author: gunjan palariya
reviews.content: the app has so many glitches specially during volatile market hours. the app closes and doesn't responds, and it affects trading.

reviews.author: M A Rahman
reviews.content: sometimes I hack and am unable to order to sell or buy at that time. It needs to work on its smoothness and authenticity.

reviews.author: Ashok Mahto
reviews.content: Imagine i make position in index which have monthly, weekly and day expiry and weekly and day expiry, expired on same day and P&L graph show total p&l then how can I analyse my day expiry and weekly expiry p&l which one have performed well or for this i have to open account in two different brokers.

reviews.author: Kushal Dahale
reviews.content: Dear Grow Team, I didnt like the UI interface it's very difficult to know portfolio details and profit loss details share charges details as compared to other share brokers Need to be inhance

reviews.author: SUMEET PARAKH
reviews.content: The app is crashing today sir . Despite logging through mobile verification, it is automatically getting logged out even after catching otp

reviews.author: Aparna Bubna
reviews.content: customer service calls have wait time for 5 + minutes. post that line just disconnects automatically. the mutual fund NAV refresh does not work for weeks now and no update on when and how will it be fixed

reviews.author: sacc Jjj
reviews.content: Fonts are very small ... bug in gtt ( trigger orders )- only few orders are shown under filter- gtt-buy-status open. kindly correct it

reviews.author: Neel Shah
reviews.content: everything is fine can you make different app for upi if possible like full payment app upi, card , fd , and rewards and credit card facilities

reviews.author: Artist Nahi Art
reviews.content: Please bring the old update. of the dashboard screen. Indixes like nifty sensex should show in the square card.

reviews.author: Harry Singh
reviews.content: Kindly show the sector in which the stock falls into when we open the stock name profile.. earlier it used to be a small label at the upper right corner. Please add that detail back.. or better still, Please provide a small Tab or button which gives Some information about the sector in which it falls into, what the company does, what's their moat, their compitition etc.. it would be very helpful if we have such information available at just a click..The app is doing Great work! keep it up !

reviews.author: Madhu A
reviews.content: Your app is great! I’d like to suggest a small improvement: while reviewing GTT orders, the current market price is only visible after selecting the script and opening the popup. It would be very helpful if the market price could be displayed directly in the GTT order window, making it easier to review and quickly edit GTT orders.

reviews.author: JayantiM
reviews.content: Simple to handle but very effective to use. In Mutual Fund, ranking shows but there is no option to see other top ranked funds of the same category. Display of such fund with rank would be helpful in investment. Customer care is helpful in simple query through text massage only.

reviews.author: Shibraj Chowdhury
reviews.content: So far the experience has been good. However, you guys don't update data regularly. eg. Recently I received a mail from ICICI fundhouse that the expense ratio of ICICI Large cap has increased from 0.69% to 0.72% but in your app the rate is 0.87%. This is a huge problem as we normally check these parameters before making any investments. There are many other lapses like this. You should focus on fixing these issues.

reviews.author: Nayan Kalra
reviews.content: app is fast and reliable just one problem it is very difficult to change/edit stoploss or targets. and do not show price and percentage of the selected area, it only shows information of the particular candle selected and brokerage is too high, but okay when seeing it's free to open and maintain account

reviews.author: soum gupta
reviews.content: Super app with zero AMC charges. But I have only one suggestion, please provide an option to buy stocks on the basis of amount. It only shows quantity, converting into amount takes time and makes some user confused on the conversion. so please work on this to provide 'Amount option while buying stocks'

reviews.author: Sudipta Kumari
reviews.content: there should be option to give alias name to your funds as well. eg: if i am having 3 goal for which let suppose am running sip for some amount in hdfc targetted for Flat . in debt fund i am keeping money for admission, another fund for future abroad vacation . so there is always a targetted amount as well as priority also. i want to keep name to those funds to keep myself clear and help myself looking on dashboard easily. may be just alias name as a suffix of fund name would be helpful

reviews.author: Siddharth Rocks
reviews.content: I like the app, only 1 thing is missing chart screen turns off Without movement, please add always screen on mode in groww app, for better CHART viewing 👍🏻

reviews.author: Padm Chaudhary
reviews.content: good app for exploring stocks, but only 10 watchlist option. other broker give more than 10 watchlist create option. if groww provide 20 to 30 watchlist create option than i usee only groww because groww interface is simple and easy to understand.

reviews.author: Lovers day YouTube channel
reviews.content: Hello Groww Team, Your app is very nice and easy to use for Demat accounts, trading, and mutual fund investments. However, compared to some other trading apps like some trading charts, settings, and trading map features are better there. I have one suggestion for improvement in the Groww app. In the mutual fund section, it would be very helpful if you show how many people are investing in each fund and how much money investors have invested in that fund. This will help users popular funds.😢😂❤

reviews.author: Study Lit
reviews.content: Addition of trailing SL in F&O trading and scalping on Nifty 50 Chart itself will be more user friendly.Also,try to include drag and select a limit price on chart to buy or sell would be greatly beneficial. I would give it a 5 star rating if it all these things are included in the chart itself instead sepate premium chart.

reviews.author: Vyass.k
reviews.content: I have been using the app for 3 years It is overall good. It need to improve at order execution in the intraday segment , it lags in speed execution.

reviews.author: Kula Nanda Sharma
reviews.content: The application is easy to use, but I am facing an issue with SL execution in F&O. For example, today my stop-loss was set to trigger at ₹380, but it got executed at ₹376.60 instead. I have no idea about this. The app needs to work on better fill prices during volatility.

reviews.author: Sriram
reviews.content: All the basic features are useful. The one thing I miss is the custom portfolio split for mutual funds similar to stocks. I want to categorise and see how my funds are performing. If this is added then it's a wholesome package. This would allow me to bring all my funds into groww and use this as my only investment app.

reviews.author: Adarsh Bhardwaj
reviews.content: Nice simple interface for beginners. Has explanation for new technical terms too. FEEDBACK: can add live data for 1yr 3yr, 5yr rolling returns, alpha, sharpe & sortino in the details for each fund. kind of helps in getting a better picture

reviews.author: rishav Kumar
reviews.content: recently changed view of gtt orders where you can't see the current market price of scrips is something I didn't like...you have to open every single gtt order placed to know what's the current price of that particular scrip is. please get back to earlier interface.

reviews.author: Edwin Francis
reviews.content: Great app with a clean and easy interface for trading. It would be even better if Groww could add Trailing Stop Loss, VWAP indicator, and Volume in the charts. These features are very important for intraday and options traders to make better decisions and manage risk effectively. Hope the Groww team adds these soon!

reviews.author: Hari krishan Kashyap
reviews.content: Rest everything is good, but it can be more comfortable if app will have option of currency trading & while using the app in any segment & closing in the same , after starting next time app will start from home page or segment lock . so that no one can see the portfolio status....

reviews.author: kunal gulwani
reviews.content: Best in the segment. No in-app ads is the best feature. Clean UI and theme, never failed, hanged or crashed on me.

reviews.author: Shibayan Mukherjee
reviews.content: One of the few investment apps that actually feels simple instead of confusing. Clean design, fast transactions, and everything is easy to find. Good for both beginners and regular investors. Makes tracking stocks and mutual funds much more convenient.

reviews.author: G S
reviews.content: Suggestion: About adding Widget Dear Developer, if you add this feature widget in the app the user may be very helpful and make interest in Groww App. Scrolling Stock Price Bar Widget 1) In this widget user can add his favourite Stocks/ETF/Fund etc to show its live price 2) The widget may be fully customizable like font, Bar position, colour, Scrolling speed, Size of bar, Background color or transparent. 3)The widget may shown on anywhere in screen or lock screen or both it may be optional.

reviews.author: Kiran SM
reviews.content: app deserves 5 stars for its user friendly interface, because there's no bond market viewing and trading, and still we can buy bonds feels that something is lacking, please update this issue soon.

reviews.author: Prof. Sandeep Rajbhar
reviews.content: Good but Customer care cannot be contacted quickly and the profit in rupees per lot should be mentioned there on every order like Angle One App and Open Position are not working properly... Don't Trust on Technical Analysis for Stock. I may be wrong.

reviews.author: Pradeep Kumar
reviews.content: It's unable to import external funds from the past 10 days. Why? is there any issue? If so, is there any ETR? And we dont have any complaints or escalation mechanisms in the app, please provide these.

reviews.author: Prateek Dobal
reviews.content: Please fix the Tax Harvesting option. It keeps showing the login page of Groww. And even when I try to login in that page, it takes no action.

reviews.author: Vedant
reviews.content: really good app with great potential ,id recommend everyone should use it.Only one problem,pls fix certain PnL updating issues ,the PnL in the commodities section doesn't update per candle stick closure or ends up updating only every 5-10 mins ,pls fix ,overall 4/5 ,ima continue w this app for years moving forward

reviews.author: Harit Mohan Saxena
reviews.content: stock portfolio analysis line chart is broken, my guess is it is not taking etf into account for selling price but considering it in buying price PS: It is still broken, it shows my investment in loss in analysis screen. something is wrong

reviews.author: Manish arora
reviews.content: App is great but I wonder why you guys stopped "External Mutual Funds Tracking"? Can you please help us with a timeline like when it'll be live again as it has been a while since it got suspended.

reviews.author: Vijay Shanbhag
reviews.content: Very handy app for any layman to buy & sell shares. If Groww can give us technical knowledge by conducting a few seminars to which shares to hold, buy and sell will be useful for senior citizens like us. They can do online courses as well for us which will benefit us in future.

reviews.author: sunny chauhan
reviews.content: V. Good app. But please On homepage, At Top showing Nifty 50, Sensex,bank Nifty, global sign in Horizontal Row is now very Thin & too much small from last update. please make that row slightly bigger, bolder or In tiles Foam as it was before the update it was. current is very small letters & over minimalistic.

reviews.author: ONEGO ENTERPRISES
reviews.content: Key Missing Feature: 2-Leg Orders in Delivery & GTT Groww is great, but lacks 2-leg orders (SL + target) for Delivery & GTT Buy/Sell—available only in Intraday. Busy users miss out on automated exits for long-term trades. Also add Disclosed Quantity option.

reviews.author: DINESH KUMAR G
reviews.content: Very easy-to-use trading app with a clean interface. Great for beginners and long-term investors. Smooth account opening and good overall experience

reviews.author: Nagaraj M S
reviews.content: very good app been using for past 3 years. i suggest to the product manager that we need option to invest every week in SIP for MF.

reviews.author: Aanand Choudhary
reviews.content: ⛔RSI removed in new updates but over all experience is Good👌 service on top catagory. really best in all available application options in market💐

reviews.author: Akash Das
reviews.content: Groww is a great platform, but it lacks an important security feature. Please implement TOTP-based Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) for login and transactions. OTP-only security is not sufficient today. Adding authenticator-based 2FA will significantly improve user safety and trust. Kindly prioritize this feature.

reviews.author: Nagarajan Krishnamoorthy
reviews.content: Very Good app. most features we need is all inbuilt. Only thing I found is little lag. most notifications are delayed. From opening bell to my watchlist stocks performance notifications. Whenever it touches all time high or low notifications are coming only after 15 minutes. The new update with technical section is too good. The alarm: if we set a alert for a stock price @175 it notifies only if it touches ₹175. but It skips if price jumped from 173-176

reviews.author: Karunakar Mantri
reviews.content: Your earlier nifty index indicator was really great for visual at top position, but after update the latest it's not like comfortable. Pls make it as it was or make it movable with bold.

reviews.author: Chinmay Kolte
reviews.content: i love the part where general information for example in section of bonds there is clear explanation of what is bonds. But the automation(stop loss and target trade especially in intraday) confuses a lot

reviews.author: Amit Burnwal
reviews.content: Please revert the change, the indices section has become like a strip, earlier size was good where you can see the relevant details without opening.

reviews.author: Vikash Sharma
reviews.content: I have used many apps but this ones my favourite. The interface of the app is very simple and minimalistic with all the requirements I need to look to but I have one request to groww that please offer a brokerage free plan and keep the free plan also but brokerage free plan helps to daily traders a lot. Other than that everything is awesome. Edit: And also add daily profit and loss section for delivery buy \ sell.

reviews.author: Amit erp
reviews.content: Very easy to use for investment in individual stocks and Mutual funds. But you will not get detailed information for any stock for analysis purpose like we get in a screener like app. Mutual fund details are there with their rankings. Their short term and long term performance can be tracked also. Another issue is Customer service number ( always busy) . And if I text my issue only to get a child like feedback from a person who does not clearly understand my main issue.

reviews.author: manjunatha b
reviews.content: one of the best, all the features are excellent.. only feedback is in the Option basket the strike from different weeks is not featured, it's allowing only same week. no other points .. the best.. Edit 17/04/26 after so many years of trading now I am growing 💗 very happy. Thank you team..

reviews.author: Sachin Kewat
reviews.content: Good features. Please add short-term timeframes like 5m, 15m, 30m, 1hr, and 4hr, and long-term timeframes like 1 week and 1 month in technical analysis. Also add open interest (OI), pivot levels, and Fibonacci levels for both indices and options. In fundamentals, more depth is required - such as SWOT analysis, insights, forecasts, and ratings.

reviews.author: Sivakumar Rajendran
reviews.content: Very simple and easy to use. Has all the information required for trading smoothly. Yet I need some other options. 1. To use rectangle properly, add the middle line. 2. In top down analysis I use higher time frame to mark the key zones. To refine it I need smaller time frame where I find difficult in grow app, for It just provides past three months history only. Every thing else is fine.

reviews.author: rishi kumar
reviews.content: One of my most favorite applications for investing and trading! The interface is clean, simple, and very user-friendly, making it perfect for both beginners and experienced users. Everything from stocks to mutual funds is easily accessible, and transactions are smooth and quick. Highly recommend Groww to anyone looking for a reliable and hassle-free investment platform!

reviews.author: GOUTAM SAHOO
reviews.content: superb app but sometimes(in fact many times) the order limit price doesn't reflect in order, I think we need to refresh multiple times and many times we need to close the app and again need to start to see the modify price, please improve this, In fact the game is all about ordering. Thank you.

reviews.author: ARRUP KUMAR PATRA
reviews.content: I have been using the Grow app for about three and a half years.It would be good if you added some more new features. Such as a trailing stop loss. Scalping mode of F And O stock

reviews.author: sreekar jammi
reviews.content: Absolutely phenomenal app. Will get everything you could possibly need in terms of instruments or information and in a really great user interface that you just cannot not win with.

reviews.author: AVINASH PANDYA
reviews.content: superb app but sometimes(in fact many times) the order limit price doesn't reflect in order, I think we need to refresh multiple times and many times we need to close the app and again need to start to see the modify price, please improve this, In fact the game is all about ordering. Thank you

reviews.author: karthi keyan
reviews.content: Good features. Please add short-term timeframes like 5m, 15m, 30m, 1hr, and 4hr, and long-term timeframes like 1 week and 1 month in technical analysis. Also add open interest (OI), pivot levels, and Fibonacci levels for both indices and options. In fundamentals, more depth is required — such as SWOT analysis, insights, forecasts, and ratings.

reviews.author: Aneesh Sundaresh
reviews.content: Very Good app to learn and Invest. Gives Many stats and has a very simple and easy to understand and use interface. Transactions are fast and smooth

reviews.author: Divyansh Chauhan
reviews.content: Best ui i have seen made me switch from other broker app. UPI payments are surprisingly fast love it. suggestions 1. more features can be added to upi like upi lite, upi widgets etc

reviews.author: Ankush AK
reviews.content: Full of Information and easy to use and also includes new features as soon as possible. But there lack of 1 functionality that we can't modify or trail stoploss or target through chart like in trading view we have line of stoploss and target and we can trail them as required. If you guys add this feature then your app become unbeatable. Love you guys always. 👍👍

reviews.author: Mohit Verma
reviews.content: I like this app very much, trading is done easily in it, this is a very good Groww app, anyone can trade in it very easily, it has been 2 years since I am using Groww in it, I like this app I have learnt a lot from you. You should also download Groww and use Groww for future. In this you get to know all the details, that is why I like trading in Groww a lot.

reviews.author: Nitish Sharma
reviews.content: Best app for all kinds of investments. In brief, you can do/start SIP's or lumpsums in mutual funds, stocks, ETFs, F&O trading, can see and modify your portfolio anytime, can have all sort of things that an investment app should have. Best One !

reviews.author: Radhakant Sahu
reviews.content: From my initial investment I'm using Groww only, I have never been disappointed with this app. They have all the required options of investment and portfolio management. Best thing about Groww, it also provides market related + your portfolio related updates in the status. It's good that Groww provides moderate updates to fix little bit bugs + add many more new features and best UIX.

reviews.author: Saja muneer
reviews.content: Good features,Tracking my portfolio is very easy, and there are no hidden charges. It feels very secure and reliable. If you're looking to start your investment journey, this is the app to go for..!

reviews.author: Prasthun Brahma
reviews.content: Nice App. I have been using this for 2 years but nowadays I am facing one problem and that is, "scalper option" keep missing. I have to keep uninstalling then re-installing the App to get the scalper option visible.

reviews.author: Shammi Theodore
reviews.content: Onboarding was fast and segment activation was quick. Would be nice to have an option to adjust the font type and size. Trades were executed quickly.

reviews.author: Ibrahim Md
reviews.content: My favourite app is Groww because it runs smoothly without any obstacles. I feel that the app(Groww) name is absolutely perfect for everyone to grow in their life. Thanks to the Groww founders and their teams.🥰

reviews.author: Shantanu Waghmare
reviews.content: there is no synchronised mobile app and web terminal.if you make imp drawings on web terminal..not showing in mobile app.and also limited candle data available for hourly and minutes chart.if you make weekly trendline for touching from last 3/4 years .. that trendline is absolutely misbehave in hourly chart only because of limited candle data available.its kindly request to look this suggestion ASAP. at the end i really much like this app

reviews.author: Syed Rayhan
reviews.content: awesome app. i like it very much. soo easy to use and easy understanding and soo flexible with more options. i loved it. i rate 10/10. thanks to developers for creating this App. 👍👍

reviews.author: Harpreet Singh
reviews.content: I absolutely love this app and its UI. The portfolio analysis system needs to be improved. It needs to calculate values and show visual representations more accurately and in a better way.

reviews.author: Rajesh Kumar
reviews.content: Groww is one of the best investment apps for beginners and professionals. The interface is very simple and user-friendly, making investing easy and smooth. I really like the zero-commission mutual funds and fast performance. It offers everything from stocks to SIP in one place. Highly recommended app for anyone who wants to grow their money smartly!

reviews.author: Salman Hussain
reviews.content: "Groww has made investing so simple and hassle-free. Tracking my portfolio is very easy, and there are no hidden charges. It feels very secure and reliable. If you're looking to start your investment journey, this is the app to go for!"

reviews.author: Pantengi Shekar
reviews.content: user interface is very convenient to use compared to other brokerage and it's not difficult for new users also. every thing is in detailed and managed the data very well. no annual mentance fee for users. I am very much satisfied with groww.

reviews.author: Tomar Dhiraj
reviews.content: Compared to other apps, this one is much better, but its brokerage is quite high. If the brokerage is reduced a little, this app would become much better than the others.

reviews.author: Karan Satyawali
reviews.content: Groo App is simple, fast, and very easy to use. I like how it focuses only on useful features instead of adding unnecessary stuff. The interface is clean and beginner-friendly, and everything runs smoothly without lag. It gives a distraction-free and well-optimized experience, making it reliable for regular use. Overall, a great app that offers a smooth and hassle-free experience—definitely worth trying.

reviews.author: ASHISH MURMU
reviews.content: best for trading investing platform in stocks and mutual fund. it's easy to understand, easy to use charts and all the market updates and informations are available to analysis to go through. I will definitely recommend. simple and easy😎.

reviews.author: Jaiदेव Chatla
reviews.content: The overall App is really smooth and good with little to no glitches. i recently also came across a feature in 8nd money app where we can track epf ppf amd other type of funds. would be glad if groww can also work and replicate the same.

reviews.author: Manish Sharma
reviews.content: The most loved app by me. I want to request that you introduce basket orders as well. I am very happy that you all introduced trailing stop loss as per request. please introduce basket order as well

reviews.author: SANTOSH KUMAR PATRO
reviews.content: Very good, Grow App operation is very good in every aspects like fund transfer, withdrawing fund to bank on time, all shares quantity report 100% correct. All issues( if any ) are resolved within time. All things are appreciated.

reviews.author: Varun Varu
reviews.content: I am truly grateful for this app. It is very user-friendly and easy to use. There are many useful features and products available on it, which makes learning and usage very convenient. The design of the app is also very attractive and beautiful. Thank you for creating such a helpful and well-designed application. It is really beneficial for students and users. thank you thank you thank you

reviews.author: Vishwajeet Singh
reviews.content: all time better. But charges is hiding on buying time. I think should be a unique page of charges and taxes and also visible in home page at any icon.

reviews.author: Suraj Kumar
reviews.content: Very Nice App, Easy to understand and Easy to Purchase and Sale Funds. Add to cart option also available but while add to cart fund current status not shown.

reviews.author: Sagnik Mahanta
reviews.content: Everything is good but sometimes there are technical glitches and the money withdrawal attempts are very bad, the money cannot be withdrawn immediately and you have to wait a day or two. It would be great if it was faster.

reviews.author: Lagan Sharma
reviews.content: Back office reports are very useful for reviewing past trades. I often check them to understand my performance and learn from previous decisions. That feature adds real value

reviews.author: Srini
reviews.content: Great and very friendly app. compared to other similar apps this is much user friendly and its simplicity makes it a quick decision on trades The app is quite faster and I can see a lot of improvements happening within the app often.

reviews.author: Diwakar G
reviews.content: User-friendly UI, easy for beginners in trading, good for tracking external portfolio as well. Suggest to add external investment like NPS, EPFO in the dashboard to track all investment in one place

reviews.author: Mohammed Yoonus K
reviews.content: Excellent user interface with lots of useful trading information presented in a clean and organized way. It’s very easy to navigate, even for beginners, which makes it perfect for the new generation entering the stock market. The overall experience feels smooth, fast, and user-friendly.
